arts.ttl: Harry Kane's double on 50th appearance helps Bayern Munich survive late Holstein Kiel comeback
arts.sum: Harry Kane marked his 50th Bundesliga appearance with a brace as Bundesliga leaders Bayern Munich held off a spirited late fightback from Holstein Kiel in a seven-goal thriller at the Allianz Arena. Kiel's best opportunity of the half fell to Lewis Holtby, whose close-range effort was cleared off the line by Minjae Kim. As the first half drew to a close, Kane doubled Bayern's lead with a powerful header from Kingsley Coman's cross, sending the hosts into the break with a deserved cushion.

arts.ttl: ‘My information’: Fabrizio Romano shares what could happen with Mathys Tel amid Arsenal links

arts.ttl: Report: Leon Goretzka will run out his contract at Bayern Munich
arts.sum: However, unless a decent offer from another club comes, he’ll just ride out the rest of his contract: If a suitable club comes in for him in summer, he’d consider it.

arts.ttl: Breaking: Manchester United could submit offer for Bayern Munich’s Mathys Tel, Aston Villa could also jump in
arts.sum: According to a report from Sky Sport journalists Florian Plettenberg and Kerry Hau, Manchester United has “signaled” to Bayern Munich that they could submit a loan offer for Mathys Tel. Can Manchester United or Aston Villa convince Tel to leave?

arts.ttl: Mathys Tel sends transfer message to Man Utd and Arsenal after Tottenham rejection
arts.sum: Bayern Munich striker Mathys Tel rejected a move to Tottenham on Friday after the clubs agreed a £50million transfer fee, giving Manchester United and Arsenal an opportunity to capitalise

arts.ttl: Manchester United ‘clearly signalled’ to club they’re interested in transfer – Keeping them and player on hook
arts.sum: Manchester United have ‘clearly signalled’ to Bayern Munich in the last few hours that they are considering making a loan offer for Mathys Tel. That’s according to journalist Florian Plettenberg, who reports that Manchester United want to be prepared in case Marcus Rashford departs. Tel has been the subject of intense speculation this week after The post Manchester United ‘clearly signalled’ to club they’re interested in transfer – Keeping them and player on hook appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Former Bayern Munich youngster Jamie Lawrence talks about Miroslav Klose’s lasting impact on his footballing career
arts.sum: “I remember that Miroslav Klose often took time for me and explained to me clearly what would happen if I was in the ‘wrong’ or ‘right’ position, so to speak, when I was inviting the striker to score goals and when I was making it damn difficult for him,” Lawrence explained, via @iMiaSanMia_GER . Lawrence is flourishing and it has a good deal to do with the World Cup winner’s efforts.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich vs. Holstein Kiel: Live stream, Game time thread, How to watch
arts.sum: Be sure to stay tuned to Bavarian Podcast Works for all of your up to date coverage on Bayern Munich and Germany. A look at the rosters and injuries for Holstein Kiel and Bayern Munich.

arts.ttl: Manchester United make verbal offer for Mathys Tel
arts.sum: Manchester United have made a verbal offer to Bayern Munich for Mathys Tel, who will be left out of the squad for Saturday's game against Holstein Kiel, according to Sky Germany.

arts.ttl: Man City draw Real & Celtic face Bayern in Champions League play-offs
arts.sum: Manchester City will play Real Madrid while Celtic will face Bayern Munich in the Champions League play-off round.
